items.title: Gokaldas Exports posts Rs 15 crore Q3 profit, sees sequential recovery despite US tariff impact
items.description: Gokaldas Exports posted ₹15 crore Q3 FY26 profit, up 81% sequentially, hinting recovery despite global headwinds. Yearly profit fell on US tariffs, while productivity gains, cost controls, stable revenue, and improving margins supported quarter-on-quarter performance across India and Africa outlook.
